channel.title: Barefoot Daily News Bulletin
channel.description: A daily good-news bulletin covering recreational fishing, the outdoors and the Northern Territory, Australia and further afield, with the doom-and-gloom left out.
channel.itunes:author: Glenn Watt
channel.itunes:subtitle: Fishing, outdoors and Northern Territory news
channel.itunes:summary: A daily good-news bulletin covering recreational fishing, the outdoors and the Northern Territory, Australia and further afield, with the doom-and-gloom left out.

item.title: Barefoot Daily News Bulletin — Thursday 16 July 2026
item.description: In this edition: Simpson Desert conservation deal marks national milestone (Katherine Times); Douglas-Daly station central to NT cotton plans returns to market (Katherine Times); Caye Caulker youngsters finish first fly-fishing and conservation camp (The San Pedro Sun); Anglers asked to weigh in on Victoria's mulloway rules (Fishing World); New artificial reef sunk off Coffs Harbour to lift fishing (Fishing World); Torres Strait clean-up clears 49 tonnes of marine debris (Mirage News / AFMA); Numbat's long recovery earns a step back from the brink (Mongabay); Seven-year-old in pyjamas lands state-record gar (Wired2Fish); Young Idaho angler writes her name in the record books (Idaho State Journal); Maine lobstermen land the one-in-fifty-million catch — twice (The Lincoln County News)
item.content:encoded:
In this edition:

  • Simpson Desert conservation deal marks national milestone — Katherine Times
  • Douglas-Daly station central to NT cotton plans returns to market — Katherine Times
  • Caye Caulker youngsters finish first fly-fishing and conservation camp — The San Pedro Sun
  • Anglers asked to weigh in on Victoria's mulloway rules — Fishing World
  • New artificial reef sunk off Coffs Harbour to lift fishing — Fishing World
  • Torres Strait clean-up clears 49 tonnes of marine debris — Mirage News / AFMA
  • Numbat's long recovery earns a step back from the brink — Mongabay
  • Seven-year-old in pyjamas lands state-record gar — Wired2Fish
  • Young Idaho angler writes her name in the record books — Idaho State Journal
  • Maine lobstermen land the one-in-fifty-million catch — twice — The Lincoln County News

item.title: Barefoot Daily News Bulletin — Wednesday 15 July 2026
item.description: In this edition: Hundreds turn out for the Daly River Barra Classic, running since 1982 (Oz Arab Media); Pro tournament scoring tech now free for everyday fishing clubs (The Bass Cast); Norwegian hook maker unveils new point design at world's biggest tackle show (Angling International); Daiwa releases budget-friendly DX rod series (Fishing World Australia); Record $3.25 million prize purse announced for new bass fishing championship (The Bass Cast); Idaho's South Fork Snake River fishing best at dawn and dusk as heat builds (Fly Fish Food); Seven-year-old lands state-record gar in his pyjamas (Wired2Fish); The bass tournament near-misses that live on in fishing folklore (Wired2Fish); New fish habitat project gives tournament bass a place to recover (The Bass Cast); New artificial reef off Coffs Harbour to boost fish habitat (Fishing World)
item.content:encoded:
In this edition:

  • Hundreds turn out for the Daly River Barra Classic, running since 1982 — Oz Arab Media
  • Pro tournament scoring tech now free for everyday fishing clubs — The Bass Cast
  • Norwegian hook maker unveils new point design at world's biggest tackle show — Angling International
  • Daiwa releases budget-friendly DX rod series — Fishing World Australia
  • Record $3.25 million prize purse announced for new bass fishing championship — The Bass Cast
  • Idaho's South Fork Snake River fishing best at dawn and dusk as heat builds — Fly Fish Food
  • Seven-year-old lands state-record gar in his pyjamas — Wired2Fish
  • The bass tournament near-misses that live on in fishing folklore — Wired2Fish
  • New fish habitat project gives tournament bass a place to recover — The Bass Cast
  • New artificial reef off Coffs Harbour to boost fish habitat — Fishing World

item.title: Barefoot Daily News Bulletin — Tuesday 14 July 2026
item.description: In this edition: Ohio farm-pond angler lands new state record green sunfish (Wired2Fish); Z-Man Fishing launches sinking Kingpin and Stuntman soft lures (Wired2Fish); Visiting Georgia angler reels in new Idaho state record brown trout (The Daily Caller / Idaho Fish and Game); US states rally anglers to help stop the spread of invasive species (Wired2Fish)
item.content:encoded:
In this edition:

  • Ohio farm-pond angler lands new state record green sunfish — Wired2Fish
  • Z-Man Fishing launches sinking Kingpin and Stuntman soft lures — Wired2Fish
  • Visiting Georgia angler reels in new Idaho state record brown trout — The Daily Caller / Idaho Fish and Game
  • US states rally anglers to help stop the spread of invasive species — Wired2Fish

item.title: Barefoot Daily News Bulletin — Monday 13 July 2026
item.description: In this edition: NSW clubs invited to apply for Gone Fishing Weekend support packages (Fishing World); Bassmaster unveils 2026 rankings of America's 100 best bass lakes (Bassmaster / PR Newswire); Bureau of Meteorology declares El Niño underway, monsoon onset likely delayed in the north (Weatherzone / Bureau of Meteorology); Garmin unveils LiveScope 2 live-scan sonar series (Wired2Fish); Georgia's coast sees a hot start to July with red snapper season on hold (Georgia Outdoor News); Fly-rod anglers join the dice and urchin lure craze (Wired2Fish); Missouri angler lands a pair of catfish totalling 178 pounds in one hookup (Wired2Fish); Michigan shoreline angler lands 48.1-pound flathead catfish (Wired2Fish); Florida angler fights off alligator with his own fishing rod (Wired2Fish); New artificial reef installed off Coffs Harbour to boost fish stocks (Fishing World)
item.content:encoded:
In this edition:

  • NSW clubs invited to apply for Gone Fishing Weekend support packages — Fishing World
  • Bassmaster unveils 2026 rankings of America's 100 best bass lakes — Bassmaster / PR Newswire
  • Bureau of Meteorology declares El Niño underway, monsoon onset likely delayed in the north — Weatherzone / Bureau of Meteorology
  • Garmin unveils LiveScope 2 live-scan sonar series — Wired2Fish
  • Georgia's coast sees a hot start to July with red snapper season on hold — Georgia Outdoor News
  • Fly-rod anglers join the dice and urchin lure craze — Wired2Fish
  • Missouri angler lands a pair of catfish totalling 178 pounds in one hookup — Wired2Fish
  • Michigan shoreline angler lands 48.1-pound flathead catfish — Wired2Fish
  • Florida angler fights off alligator with his own fishing rod — Wired2Fish
  • New artificial reef installed off Coffs Harbour to boost fish stocks — Fishing World

item.title: A new reef down south and a barra tug-of-war
item.description: In this edition: New artificial reef sunk off Coffs to fire up the fishing (Fishing World); Barra on the fly: a proper tug-of-war worth a re-watch (Flylords Mag)
item.content:encoded:
In this edition:

  • New artificial reef sunk off Coffs to fire up the fishing — Fishing World
  • Barra on the fly: a proper tug-of-war worth a re-watch — Flylords Mag

item.title: Snapper smiles and a saltwater double haul
item.description: In this edition: 154 boats, good vibes and a big red: the Trophy Hunter Snapper Bash (Fishing World); Sharpen your saltwater double haul: a quick video refresher (Gink & Gasoline)
item.content:encoded:
In this edition:

  • 154 boats, good vibes and a big red: the Trophy Hunter Snapper Bash — Fishing World
  • Sharpen your saltwater double haul: a quick video refresher — Gink & Gasoline

item.title: The Territory Wrap — Tuesday 7 July 2026
item.description: In this edition: Christmas Island still delivering the goods on the flats (Big Y Fly Co); Aussie-made lures and flies star at this month's Expo (Fishing World); Victoria's next 10-million-fish stocking season kicks off (Victorian Fisheries Authority); Queensland opens up more dams for stocked fishing (Fishing Charters Australia)
item.content:encoded:
In this edition:

  • Christmas Island still delivering the goods on the flats — Big Y Fly Co
  • Aussie-made lures and flies star at this month's Expo — Fishing World
  • Victoria's next 10-million-fish stocking season kicks off — Victorian Fisheries Authority
  • Queensland opens up more dams for stocked fishing — Fishing Charters Australia
